name: IRC_CANDIDATES_DN
description: This table stores candidate denormalized information which will be used for Indexing.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table and also foreign Key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether candidate is recommendated for being rehired. This is a denormalized column derived from PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION.

columns.Name: WORKEXP_MONTHS
columns.Comments: This indicates the cumulative months of experience.

columns.Name: LATEST_MKT_EMAIL_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time when last recruiting marketing email was sent

columns.Name: ADDRESS_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table for generating the FQN. Reference the geography_id in HZ_GEOGRAPHY_IDENTIFIERS to create the FQN alternates.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_COUNTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_CITY_ID
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_COUNTY_ID
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LATITUDE
columns.Comments: Used to store Latitude  Information for the Geography for Spatial Proximity and containment purposes.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: Used to store Longitude Information for the Geography for Spatial Proximity and containment purposes.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
